C.label: SEO (mostly independent, OG depends on T-002)

tasks.title: Create 404 and 500 error pages
tasks.description:
Create /src/pages/404.astro and /src/pages/500.astro using BaseLayout.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/pages/404.astro (create)
- apps/web/src/pages/500.astro (create)
- packages/i18n/src/locales/es.json (add error page keys)
- packages/i18n/src/locales/en.json (add error page keys)
- packages/i18n/src/locales/pt.json (add error page keys)

Acceptance criteria:
- 404 page renders via BaseLayout with header and footer, contains a heading, sub-message, search suggestion, and 'Go home' CTA using t()
- 500 page renders via BaseLayout with a 'Something went wrong' heading, sub-message, 'Try again' button (reloads), and 'Go home' link using t()
- All text strings use t() with keys present in all three locale files
- No stack traces or technical details exposed to the user

Testing: Write Vitest/testing-library tests in apps/web/src/pages/__tests__/ verifying rendered link and button presence.

tasks.title: Fix canonical URL generation
tasks.description:
Replace hardcoded 'https://hospeda.com.ar' domain in canonical URL construction with a runtime-derived value.

Acceptance criteria:
- Canonical URL is derived from PUBLIC_SITE_URL env var or Astro.site at runtime
- getSiteUrl() returns the correct base URL without trailing slash
- Staging environment produces staging canonical URLs
- TypeScript compiles without errors

Testing: Unit tests in apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/urls.test.ts verifying getSiteUrl() returns correct values for different PUBLIC_SITE_URL inputs.

tasks.title: Fix logo image paths in Header and Footer
tasks.description:
Replace string-path logo references with static imports using Astro's <Image> component.

- apps/web/src/components/Header.astro

- Rendered with Astro <Image> component with explicit width, height, and localized alt attribute using t()
- Build output includes logo with content-hashed filename
- Logo visible in both header and footer in production build

Testing: Build-time verification; add locale keys for alt text to all three locale files.

tasks.title: Use Astro <Image> for all local images
tasks.description: Audit all local image usages and migrate from string paths to Astro component with static imports. Files affected: - Any .astro or .tsx file in apps/web/src/ that uses with local string paths - apps/web/src/components/ (multiple files, audit required) Acceptance criteria: - All local images use static import + component (not raw img src strings) - All img tags include explicit width, height, and appropriate loading attribute (eager for above-fold, lazy otherwise) - Build output serves images in WebP/AVIF format with content-hashed URLs - No TypeScript errors Testing: Build inspection to confirm optimized format output; no visual regressions.

tasks.title: Fix hero image optimization via getImage()
tasks.description:
Refactor HeroImageRotator to process hero images through getImage() from astro:assets instead of using raw .src strings.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/components/HeroImageRotator.astro (or .tsx)
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/index.astro (hero image imports)

Acceptance criteria:
- Each hero image processed through getImage() at build time
- First hero image uses loading='eager'; subsequent images use loading='lazy'
- Optimized src, width, height, and format values passed to rendered img elements
- No TypeScript errors

Testing: Build inspection confirming getImage() output is used; LCP measurement via Lighthouse should not regress vs baseline.

tasks.title: Create generic image fallback script
tasks.description:
Create a delegated event-listener script that replaces broken image src with the value of data-fallback attribute. This replaces per-component inline onerror handlers.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/scripts/image-fallback.ts (create)
- apps/web/src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro (inject script with nonce)
- apps/web/public/images/placeholder.webp (create/verify placeholder exists)

Acceptance criteria:
- Script attaches a single delegated 'error' listener to document (not one per image)
- When an img with data-fallback='/placeholder.webp' fails, src is swapped to the data-fallback value
- No inline onerror attributes anywhere in the codebase
- Script is compatible with nonce-based CSP (script tag carries nonce attribute injected by BaseLayout)
- Placeholder image at the referenced path always exists and returns 200

Testing: Unit tests in apps/web/src/scripts/__tests__/image-fallback.test.ts using jsdom to simulate error events.

tasks.title: Integrate image fallback into AccommodationCard and change HeroImageRotator to client:load
tasks.description:
Replace the inline onerror handler in AccommodationCard.astro with data-fallback attribute. Change HeroImageRotator hydration directive from client:visible to client:load.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/components/AccommodationCard.astro (remove onerror, add data-fallback)
- apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/index.astro (change client:visible to client:load on HeroImageRotator)

Acceptance criteria:
- AccommodationCard img has no onerror attribute; uses data-fallback pointing to the placeholder
- HeroImageRotator uses client:load directive
- Page renders correctly without inline event handlers
- CSP with no unsafe-inline would not be violated by these components

Testing: Visual inspection; automated test verifying no onerror attribute in rendered HTML.

tasks.title: Implement nonce-based CSP in middleware and BaseLayout
tasks.description:
Generate a cryptographic nonce per request in middleware, thread it to BaseLayout, inject it into all inline scripts/styles, and set the CSP header in Report-Only mode.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/middleware.ts (generate nonce, set CSP header, expose nonce via locals)
- apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts (add generateNonce(), buildCspHeader())
- apps/web/src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro (read nonce from Astro.locals, apply to inline scripts/styles)
- apps/web/src/scripts/image-fallback.ts (already nonce-aware from TASK-067-006)

Acceptance criteria:
- generateNonce() produces a base64-encoded string of >= 16 random bytes
- Each request gets a unique nonce value (verified by calling twice)
- Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header is set on all responses
- Header includes nonce-{value} and strict-dynamic in script-src, NO unsafe-inline
- All inline <script> and <style> tags rendered by BaseLayout carry the nonce attribute
- CSP header includes all required directives: default-src, script-src, style-src, img-src, connect-src, font-src, frame-ancestors

Testing: Unit tests in apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/middleware-helpers.test.ts for generateNonce() uniqueness and buildCspHeader() directive correctness.

tasks.title: Fix JSON-LD script injection vulnerability
tasks.description:
Update JsonLd.astro to escape </script> sequences inside JSON-LD content before injecting via set:html.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/components/JsonLd.astro (add escaping logic)
- apps/web/src/lib/sanitize-html.ts (add escapeJsonLd() utility)

Acceptance criteria:
- Any string containing </script> (case-insensitive) is escaped to <\/script> in the JSON output
- The resulting JSON remains valid and parseable by JSON.parse()
- A test with an accommodation name containing </script> verifies the escaped output
- <script>alert(1)</script> in a description field does not execute JavaScript

Testing: Unit tests in apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/sanitize-html.test.ts for the escapeJsonLd() function.

tasks.title: Restrict CSP img-src and validate connect-src env var
tasks.description:
Tighten CSP img-src from 'https:' to specific trusted domains. Add validation so an empty PUBLIC_API_URL does not produce a malformed connect-src directive.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts (update buildCspHeader() img-src and connect-src logic)
- apps/web/src/middleware.ts (log warning if PUBLIC_API_URL is missing)

Acceptance criteria:
- img-src lists only trusted domains: self, Vercel blob storage origin, API media domain, placeholder image origin
- connect-src only includes PUBLIC_API_URL when the env var is a valid non-empty URL
- If PUBLIC_API_URL is missing, middleware logs a warning and omits it from connect-src (no empty token)
- Existing tests for buildCspHeader() pass and new tests cover the empty-env case

Testing: Additional unit tests in apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/middleware-helpers.test.ts for the missing/empty PUBLIC_API_URL case.

tasks.title: Write tests for API layer (client.ts, transforms.ts, endpoints.ts)
tasks.description:
Create test files for the API client, transform functions, and endpoints module.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/lib/api/__tests__/client.test.ts (create)
- apps/web/src/lib/api/__tests__/transforms.test.ts (create)
- apps/web/src/lib/api/__tests__/endpoints.test.ts (create)

Acceptance criteria:
- client.ts tests mock fetch and verify correct headers, error handling, and response parsing
- transforms.ts tests verify malformed data is handled without uncaught exceptions
- endpoints.ts tests verify correct URL construction for each endpoint
- All exported functions tested with happy path, error, and edge cases
- src/lib/api/ achieves >= 90% coverage

Testing: vitest --coverage on src/lib/api/.

tasks.title: Write tests for middleware-helpers
tasks.description:
Create test file for middleware-helpers.ts covering nonce generation, CSP header construction, and locale detection.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/lib/__tests__/middleware-helpers.test.ts (create or extend)

Acceptance criteria:
- generateNonce() test verifies output is base64-encoded string of >= 16 bytes, unique across calls
- buildCspHeader() test verifies all required directives are present with the nonce
- buildCspHeader() test verifies connect-src behavior with missing/empty PUBLIC_API_URL
- detectLocale() tests cover: explicit locale in URL, default fallback, edge cases
- All tests follow AAA pattern

Testing: vitest run on middleware-helpers.test.ts; 100% coverage of the helpers file.

tasks.title: Write tests for auth components (SignIn, SignUp, UserNav, ForgotPassword)
tasks.description:
Create test files for authentication React components in the web app.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/components/__tests__/SignIn.test.tsx (create)
- apps/web/src/components/__tests__/SignUp.test.tsx (create)
- apps/web/src/components/__tests__/UserNav.test.tsx (create)
- apps/web/src/components/__tests__/ForgotPassword.test.tsx (create)

Acceptance criteria:
- SignIn: submitting empty email shows validation error; server error response shows localized error via t()
- SignUp: password mismatch shows error
- UserNav: renders authenticated user's name when available
- ForgotPassword: submitting shows confirmation state
- Errors do not expose raw server error messages
- Tests use @testing-library/react

Testing: vitest run on auth component tests.

tasks.title: Write tests for 404/500 pages, account page auth redirect, and mi-cuenta
tasks.description:
Create test files for the error pages created in TASK-067-001 and the mi-cuenta account page auth guard.

Files affected:
- apps/web/src/pages/__tests__/404.test.ts (create)
- apps/web/src/pages/__tests__/500.test.ts (create)
- apps/web/src/pages/__tests__/mi-cuenta.test.ts (create)

Acceptance criteria:
- 404 page test verifies 'Go home' link and search suggestion are rendered
- 500 page test verifies 'Try again' button is rendered
- mi-cuenta page test verifies unauthenticated users are redirected to sign-in
- Tests use Astro testing utilities or vitest with jsdom

Testing: vitest run on page test files.
